__NOINDEX__
{{CargoRelicResonance
|relics=Baekje Kannon Statue,Locomotion No.1
|rank=orange
|amount=2
|category=self
|description=Per 50 Hellas Soul Nail of Profanity Reforged, Snail Oblivion Power +7; Hellas Soul Nail of Profanity Reforged: 3,000/3,000
}}
[[Category:Self]]
[[Category:Oblivion Power Boost]]
